## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue it closes, if any. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] RotBench fixture / check
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -q` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Change is cross-platform (macOS / Linux / Windows)
- [ ] Documentation updated; reference-doc changes follow [`DOCS_STYLE.md`](../blob/master/DOCS_STYLE.md)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or vault data in the diff
